Combat Sequencing Combat is resolved in a series of combat rounds. Each round represents approximate- ly 5 seconds. Once one combat round is over, another is begun. Combat rounds are repeated until one side or the other is dead or withdraws, or until both sides break oft. Each combat round is broken into four segreiits, All actions taken in one segment are resolved before the next segment is begun. The sequence of segments is: 
WH Combat Sequence
